His confidence that my story will perfectly weave into his gameplay systems, and his commitment to having those intricate mechanics ready for seamless integration, is exactly what I needed to hear. The pressure of only two turns left is still very real, but his reply makes me feel even more confident that we're both operating with the same urgency and direction.
